About KC Needlepoint KC Needlepoint is your one stop needlepoint shop for all of your stitching needs! Whether you are a seasoned stitcher or are looking for your very first needlepoint project, you will be able to find something you love at KC Needlepoint. If you're looking to take the guesswork out of your next project, purchase one of our premade needlepoint kits, available in a variety of different skill levels. Alternatively, peruse through different canvas themes and choose from over 10,000 different designs available online. When you have picked out your canvas, we are ready to help you select threads from a variety of wools, silks, cottons and other specialty fibers to make your project truly one of a kind! When you have finished stitching your needlepoint project, contact us to discuss the wide range of finishing options we have to offer. No matter where you live, KC Needlepoint offers free USPS shipping on every order shipped within the United States. If you are local to the Kansas City area, swing by and visit us in our retail shop at 8050 Wornall Road.  We can't wait to help you find your next needlepoint project!
